# EGPT — Electronic Graph Paper Theory

> A constructive, machine-verified proof that P = NP and a working integer-only math
> library (EGPTMath) that replaces FLOPs with IOPs — answering the question: how do
> you scale AI without cooking the planet? 85 Lean 4 theorems. No sorry. No custom
> axioms. 157 EGPTMath tests, 100% pass. Central principle: "The address is the map."

Raw access base: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eabadir/EGPT/main/

## Ideas Framework

Five interlocking ideas from five authors across a century of mathematics, physics, and computation:

- **ID1 -- Ulam:** CGS units reconstructed from a random walk (ParticlePath = List Bool)
- **ID2 -- Von Neumann:** Statistical AI computer — IOPs replace FLOPs, no error accumulation
- **ID3 -- Einstein:** Purely algebraic discrete physics — continuous fields are computable
- **ID4 -- Rota:** Entropy is the unique information measure (RET: all entropy = C x Shannon)
- **ID5 -- Abadir:** Cantor's diagonal assumes non-unique reps — CH is decidable (Hilbert #1)

Full framework with artifact maps: [IDEAS.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/IDEAS.md)
Live QFT benchmark: [Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1LQLCHDNp9kCFgJXIzlitaVxuYiHRATXm)

## Core Claims

**The proof:** P = NP, proven constructively in Lean 4 by showing that in a maximally
compressed information space (ParticlePath ≃ ℕ), defining a problem is defining its solution.

**The implementation:** EGPTMath is the integer-only math library that turns the proof
into practice. All arithmetic uses IOPs (Integer Operations), not FLOPs. No floating point,
no error accumulation. The FAT (Faster Abadir Transform) demonstrates classical computation
of the Quantum Fourier Transform — pedagogical variants ship in this repo; the optimized
FAT benchmarks ~1.277 billion x faster than 2,048 GPUs on a single 1.2 GHz core.

- [README](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, philosophy, and proof chain narrative
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/AGENTS.md): AI agent navigation instructions, build commands, proof dependency graph
- [Skeptic's Guide](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/SKEPTICS_GUIDE.md): Step-by-step audited proof walkthrough
- [P=NP Proof Walkthrough](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/EGPT/PeqNP_Proof_README.md): Detailed mathematical exposition
- [Proof Validation Report](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/EGPT_PROOFS_VALIDATION.md): 85 theorems with full axiom inventory
- [Proof Dependency Graph](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/PROOF_DEPENDENCIES.md): Import chains, theorem counts, isolation guarantees
- [Proof Graph (Mermaid)](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/docs/PROOF_GRAPH.md): Visual dependency DAG with Mermaid diagrams
- [Proof Graph (JSON)](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/docs/proof_graph.json): Machine-readable dependency graph for programmatic ingestion
- [EGPT Story](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPT_STORY.md): Full narrative exposition (accessible, picture-based)
- [Academic Paper](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/content/Papers/EGPT_PeqNP/PeqNP_QED.md): Formal paper version
- [Rota's Entropy Theorem Guide](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/RET_README.md): Dedicated RET walkthrough

## Source Code — Formal Proofs (Lean 4)

- [Lean Proofs](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/tree/main/Lean/EGPT): All formal Lean 4 proofs
- [P=NP Theorem](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/EGPT/Complexity/PPNP.lean): The P_eq_NP theorem
- [Core Types](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/EGPT/Core.lean): ParticlePath, ComputerTape
- [Number Theory](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/EGPT/NumberTheory/Core.lean): ParticlePath ≃ ℕ bijection
- [Continuum Hypothesis](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/EGPT/NumberTheory/ContinuumHypothesis.lean): CH & GCH decidable (Hilbert #1)
- [Rota's Entropy Theorem](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/Lean/EGPT/Entropy/RET.lean): All entropy = C × Shannon

## Working Implementations — Pedagogical JS (EGPTMath)

EGPTMath is a pedagogical JavaScript library that translates the Lean 4 proofs into
runnable integer-only code. Every Lean concept (ParticlePath, PPF encoding, Shannon
coding, the FFT as an integer operation) has a corresponding JS implementation. The
library is intentionally unoptimized — clarity over speed, teaching over benchmarking.

- [EGPTMath overview](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/README.md): PPF representation, test results, Lean correspondence
- [EGPTMath.js](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/EGPTMath.js): Static vector algebra engine (integer-only, ~6800 lines)
- [EGPTNumber.js](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/EGPTNumber.js): PPF number representation — lossless Shannon coding
- [Developer Guide](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/EGPTMath_Developer_Guide.md): How unlimited precision works in information space

### FAT — Fast Abadir Transform (Pedagogical)

The pedagogical FAT variants demonstrate that the FFT/QFT can be computed with pure
integer arithmetic — no floating point anywhere in the transform pipeline. Twiddle
factors become exact rational coordinates on N-gon vertices. These are teaching
implementations; the optimized FAT is proprietary and not in this repository.

- [FAT overview](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/FAT/FAT_README.md): All variants, test results, what passes and what's known-limited
- [EGPTFAT.js](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/FAT/EGPTFAT.js): Canonical recursive Cooley-Tukey (integer-only)
- [EGPTFAT_PurePPF.js](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/FAT/EGPTFAT_PurePPF.js): Native BigInt variant
- [EGPTFAT_TypeSafe.js](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/EGPTMath/FAT/EGPTFAT_TypeSafe.js): Domain-safe wrappers

## Papers

- [FRAQTL White Paper](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/content/pyFRAQTL/FRAQTL_WhitePaper.md): Deterministic factorization algorithm
- [pyFRAQTL SDK](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/content/pyFRAQTL/pyFRAQTLsdk.py): Python implementation

## Interactive Demos

- [Web Demos](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/tree/main/www): Browser-based visualizations (no build step)

## Specialist Agent Instructions (.claude/agents/)

Seven specialist agents keep the mono-repo layers synchronized. Each file contains
domain-specific conventions, file inventories, sync rules, and success criteria.

- [egpt-orchestrator.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/.claude/agents/egpt-orchestrator.md): Cross-layer sync assessment and delegation — reads changes, applies sync matrix, delegates to specialists
- [lean-prover.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/.claude/agents/lean-prover.md): Lean 4 formal proofs — proof chain invariants, key definitions, module structure, proof style
- [js-engineer.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/.claude/agents/js-engineer.md): EGPTMath pedagogical JS — Lean-to-JS mapping patterns, test suite, integer-only conventions
- [doc-writer.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/.claude/agents/doc-writer.md): Documentation — CLAUDE.md files, AI navigation files, narrative docs, cross-reference checks
- [demo-builder.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/.claude/agents/demo-builder.md): Interactive web demos — Chart.js, p5.js, self-contained HTML, style guide
- [content-author.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/.claude/agents/content-author.md): Academic papers and stories — content structure, tone guidelines, key principles
- [sync-validator.md](https://github.com/eabadir/EGPT/blob/main/.claude/agents/sync-validator.md): Cross-layer consistency — 11 validation checks (build, sorry-free, theorem count, test suite, imports, isolation)
